techniques.name: Admin Portal Search
techniques.description: Searches for indexed admin-facing terms such as admin, portal, and dashboard on a target domain. This is a useful recon query for finding exposed management interfaces and branded internal portals that leak into search.
techniques.query_template: site:{domain} (inurl:admin OR inurl:portal OR intitle:"admin portal" OR intitle:dashboard)

variables.name: domain
variables.description: Primary target domain or host name.

techniques.example: site:example.com (inurl:admin OR inurl:portal OR intitle:"admin portal" OR intitle:dashboard)

techniques.name: API Host Certificate Search
techniques.description: Searches certificate transparency records for certificates that reference api-prefixed hosts on a target domain. This helps identify current or historical API hostnames that appeared in public certificate issuance.

variables.name: domain
variables.description: Base domain used to search for api-prefixed certificates.
